name: code-forge
description: Code Forge — multi-agent build system with TDD-as-phase, script-coordinated parallel review (move-pr-review pattern), and forge-guard hook discipline. Codex-mediated Phase 0 (claudex), best-of-N implementer (Opus coordinator + N Sonnet workers), specialist routing (project_domains), and e2e tests as cross-cycle invariant (Phase F).
